rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount has no relation to Educ. Code §28.021, which governs student promotion based on academic achievement. The two provisions address entirely different subject matters with no operational interaction.
quote: A student may be promoted only on the basis of academic achievement or demonstrated proficiency of the subject matter of the course or grade level.
_note: No conflict; rule_text pertains to student advancement criteria, not property tax or homestead exemptions.
